data.content: Planning complete. Implement in the create-beat UI only: persist all Create New draft fields and relationship selections to localStorage on change, restore them when the dialog reopens or the page reloads, add a left-aligned Clear button that resets to fresh defaults and removes the draft, and clear persisted data after successful Done/Create More submission. Primary touchpoints are `src/components/create-beat-dialog.tsx` for lifecycle/default handling and `src/components/beat-form.tsx` for field state plus footer actions. Main implementation risk is reconciling restored drafts with async default profile resolution without overwriting user data. Add targeted tests for persistence wiring, Clear presence/reset behavior, and submit-time draft clearing before running full quality gates in the implementation step.
